# Test Fixtures

## Sample Receipt Image

Place a valid JPEG receipt image named `sample-receipt.jpg` in this directory for E2E tests.

The image should contain:
- Vendor name
- Date
- Line items
- Subtotal
- Tax
- Total amount

You can use any real receipt photo or generate one for testing purposes.

**Note:** This file is required for the full-workflow.spec.ts test to run successfully.
